criteria_verification.criterion_text: `src/jarvis/adapters/llamaswap.py` exposes `class LlamaSwapAdapter` with constructor `__init__(self, base_url: str, *, _stub_response: Callable[[str], SwapStatus] | None = None)`. The `_stub_response` keyword-only arg is the test seam; production callers never pass it.
criteria_verification.evidence: Unchanged from turn 1 — Coach verified. LlamaSwapAdapter in src/jarvis/adapters/llamaswap.py has the exact required signature; tests/test_llamaswap_adapter.py::TestAC001ConstructorSignature has 4 tests verifying KEYWORD_ONLY kind, None default, and TypeError on positional injection.
criteria_verification.notes: Unchanged from turn 1 — Coach verified. LlamaSwapAdapter in src/jarvis/adapters/llamaswap.py has the exact required signature; tests/test_llamaswap_adapter.py::TestAC001ConstructorSignature has 4 tests verifying KEYWORD_ONLY kind, None default, and TypeError on positional injection.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `LlamaSwapAdapter.get_status(alias: str) -> SwapStatus` returns `SwapStatus(loaded_model=<alias>, eta_seconds=0, source="stub")` by default (model is assumed loaded).
criteria_verification.evidence: Unchanged from turn 1 — Coach verified. Default branch returns SwapStatus(loaded_model=alias, eta_seconds=0, source="stub"). TestAC002DefaultGetStatusReturnsLoadedSnapshot covers it.
criteria_verification.notes: Unchanged from turn 1 — Coach verified. Default branch returns SwapStatus(loaded_model=alias, eta_seconds=0, source="stub"). TestAC002DefaultGetStatusReturnsLoadedSnapshot covers it.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: When the test `_stub_response` returns `SwapStatus(loaded_model=<alias>, eta_seconds=180, source="stub")` (or any eta_seconds > 30), the adapter returns that value unchanged — the adapter does not interpret the ETA, only the supervisor does.
criteria_verification.evidence: Unchanged from turn 1 — Coach verified. get_status forwards self._stub_response(alias) verbatim. TestAC003StubResponseForwardedUnchanged covers eta_seconds=180 and source="live" propagation.
criteria_verification.notes: Unchanged from turn 1 — Coach verified. get_status forwards self._stub_response(alias) verbatim. TestAC003StubResponseForwardedUnchanged covers eta_seconds=180 and source="live" propagation.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `get_status` is pure / idempotent: repeated calls with the same alias return equivalent `SwapStatus` instances; no internal counter or cache mutation across reads (scenario: *Repeated swap-status reads for the same alias return consistent results*).
criteria_verification.evidence: Unchanged from turn 1 — Coach verified. No mutation on the read path. TestAC004PureIdempotentReads asserts equality across 5 stub reads + adapter.__dict__ unchanged after 10 default reads.
criteria_verification.notes: Unchanged from turn 1 — Coach verified. No mutation on the read path. TestAC004PureIdempotentReads asserts equality across 5 stub reads + adapter.__dict__ unchanged after 10 default reads.

criteria_verification.evidence: Unchanged from turn 1 — Coach verified. __init__.py re-exports LlamaSwapAdapter and SwapStatus with explicit __all__. TestAC005PackageReExport covers it.
criteria_verification.notes: Unchanged from turn 1 — Coach verified. __init__.py re-exports LlamaSwapAdapter and SwapStatus with explicit __all__. TestAC005PackageReExport covers it.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: No outbound HTTP call in Phase 2; no `httpx`/`requests` import required at runtime (test-overrideable stub IS the read path).
criteria_verification.evidence: Unchanged from turn 1 — Coach verified. Module imports only collections.abc.Callable and .types.SwapStatus. TestAC006NoOutboundHttp asserts via sys.modules diff and AST source-text guard.
criteria_verification.notes: Unchanged from turn 1 — Coach verified. Module imports only collections.abc.Callable and .types.SwapStatus. TestAC006NoOutboundHttp asserts via sys.modules diff and AST source-text guard.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Docstring names the real `/running` + `/log` endpoint paths so FEAT-JARVIS-004 can grep for them at swap time.
criteria_verification.evidence: Unchanged from turn 1 — Coach verified. Module-level + class-level docstrings name `GET /running` and `GET /log` with the live base URL hint. TestAC007DocstringNamesLiveEndpoints covers both substrings.
criteria_verification.notes: Unchanged from turn 1 — Coach verified. Module-level + class-level docstrings name `GET /running` and `GET /log` with the live base URL hint. TestAC007DocstringNamesLiveEndpoints covers both substrings.
